STIGMA (multiple trait) Value: 1-2 In Mw3 character who is inflicted with Stigma Trait has sore characteristic that earns him the disdain of many people. regardless of whether the disdain is deservcd. Often, (his IS some tactor that is beyond the character" = control. such as birth circumstances Tace 0r criminal conviction_ Sometimes the life character eads brings stigma with it such a5 choice of religion, education Or even profession Tnere are two levels of Stigma, depending on how widely the character will be stigmatized It the Stigma only applies in sin gle Successor State_ or Only applies among the Clans_ then it IS worth point. If, however; the Stigma iS held so widely that would affect the character two Or Morc Successor States among one Successor State and the Clans_ it iS worth 2 points.
